data.body: PLAN-REVIEW TRIAGE (verdict PASS; 8 advisories). Accepted: (1) resolve the CLI<->MCP naming drift and ENUMERATE the exact commands/tools that gain the flags (MCP: review_plan/verify_completion/review_ticket/review_code/scan_spec; pin the CLI counterparts rather than 'surfaces as they exist'); (2) add a FAILURE-PATH AC — unresolvable/absent ref, invalid --source value, object DB unreachable at REBAR_ROOT — so the controls are testable by construction; (3) add an AC for the cwd/branch decoupling + REBAR_ROOT-only-locates-object-DB behavior; (4) consider landing a thin vertical slice (one CLI cmd + one MCP tool end-to-end) before fanning out to all surfaces. None invalid.
